


```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(edgeR)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(xtail)
mainDir = "~/hsiehlab/Sonali/Steve/polysome_seq_May2024"
setwd(mainDir)

resDir = file.path(mainDir,  "TE_files")

countData <- read.delim("star_hts_reverse_hg38_cpm_protein_coding_genes.txt", header=T, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, row.names=7)
rawData <- read.delim("star_hts_reverse_hg38_raw_protein_coding_genes.txt", header=T, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, row.names=7)
countData = countData[, grep("SB", colnames(countData))]
rawData = rawData[, grep("SB", colnames(rawData))]
identical(colnames(rawData), colnames(countData))
identical( rownames(countData), rownames(rawData))


coldata = read.delim("sampleinfo.txt", header=T, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
coldata$RNA.source = gsub("Total RNA", "TotalRNA",coldata$RNA.source )
coldata$type = coldata$Replicate
coldata$type = gsub(" Replicate 1| Replicate 2| Replicate 3", "", coldata$type)
coldata$type = gsub("SPEN WT", "SPEN_WT", coldata$type)
coldata$type = gsub("SPEN KO", "SPEN_KO", coldata$type)
coldata$Treatment = gsub("Enzalutamide", "Enza", coldata$Treatment)
coldata$Replicate = gsub(" ", "_", coldata$Replicate)
coldata$new_name = apply(coldata, 1, function(x) paste0(c(x["Replicate"], x["RNA.source"], x["Treatment"]), collapse="_"))

idx = sapply(coldata[,1], function(x) grep(paste0("^", x, "_"), colnames(rawData)) )
countData = countData[, idx]
rawData = rawData[, idx]

colnames(rawData) = coldata$new_name
colnames(countData) = coldata$new_name

mat1 = rawData[, grep("80S", coldata[,2]) ]
mat2= rawData[, grep("highpoly", coldata[,2]) ]
mat3 = rawData[, grep("lowpoly", coldata[,2]) ]
mypoly = mat1 +mat2 +mat3
colnames(mypoly) = gsub("80S", "totalPoly", colnames(mypoly))

all_rna = rawData[, grep("RNA", colnames(rawData))]
all_rna = all_rna[, grep("Enza", colnames(all_rna))]
          
# (hp +80s+lp)/rna
rawData  = cbind(mypoly, all_rna)
rawData= round(rawData, 0)
countDat= cpm(rawData) # this one is new with (hp +80s+lp)/rna

# make ratio for later. 
te_mat =  data.frame(
    te_rep1_group1 = countData[, 1] / countData[,7],  
    te_rep2_group1 = countData[, 2] / countData[,8],  
    te_rep3_group1 = countData[, 3]  / countData[,9], 
    te_rep1_group2 = countData[, 4] / countData[,10],  
    te_rep2_group2 = countData[, 5] / countData[,11], 
    te_rep3_group2 = countData[, 6] / countData[,12] )  


te_mat$avg_te_group1= rowMeans(te_mat[, c("te_rep1_group1", "te_rep2_group1", "te_rep3_group1")])
te_mat$avg_te_group2 = rowMeans(te_mat[, c("te_rep1_group2", "te_rep2_group2", "te_rep3_group2")])

temp_countData = rawData
temp_cpm_counts = countData

colnames(temp_countData) = paste0("raw_", colnames(temp_countData))
colnames(temp_cpm_counts) = paste0("cpm_", colnames(temp_cpm_counts))

finaldf = cbind(gene = rownames(rawData), 
                te_mat, temp_cpm_counts, temp_countData)

res_fname = "TE_data_Highpoly_lowPoly_80s_normalize_totalRNA.txt"
write.table(finaldf, file.path( res_fname), 
            sep ="\t", quote=FALSE, row.names = FALSE, col.names=TRUE)

## run xtail 
all_data = finaldf
data = all_data[, grep("raw_", colnames(all_data))]
colnames(data) = gsub("raw_", "", colnames(data))

rp.idx = grep("totalPoly", colnames(data))
test.rp = data[, rp.idx]

rna.idx = grep("TotalRNA", colnames(data))
test.rna = data[, rna.idx]

rm1 = which(rowSums(test.rna)==0)
rm2 =which(rowSums(test.rp)==0)
rm = unique(c(rm1, rm2))
if(length(rm)!=0){
    message("removing genes:", length(rm))
    test.rp = test.rp[-rm, ]
    test.rna = test.rna[-rm, ]
}

test.group = c(rep("A", 3),rep("B", 3) )
colnames(test.rp) = c(paste0("control", 1:3), paste0("treatment", 1:3))
colnames(test.rna) = colnames(test.rp)

condition  <- c(rep("control", 3), rep("treatment",3))
test.results <- xtail(test.rna,test.rp,condition,bins=1000)

xtail_res = resultsTable(test.results)
xtail_res = xtail_res[ ,grep("_v1|_v2", colnames(xtail_res))]
xtail_res$FDR_v2 = p.adjust(xtail_res$pvalue_v2, method="BH")

xtail_res = xtail_res[, c("log2FC_TE_v2", "pvalue_v2", "FDR_v2")]
colnames(xtail_res) = paste0("xtail_", colnames(xtail_res))
xtail_res = xtail_res[ rownames(all_data), ]

up = which(xtail_res$xtail_log2FC_TE_v2  > log2(1.25) & xtail_res$xtail_FDR_v2  < 0.05) 
down = which(xtail_res$xtail_log2FC_TE_v2  < - log2(1.25) & xtail_res$xtail_FDR_v2  < 0.05)

res_fname = paste0("xtail_", res_fname)

message(res_fname,":", length(up),":", length(down))

writedf = cbind(gene = rownames(all_data), xtail_res, all_data )
writedf = writedf[ order(writedf$xtail_FDR_v2, decreasing=FALSE) , ]
write.table(writedf, res_fname, sep ="\t", quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE, col.names=TRUE)
             
```
